evidence_summary.acceptance_criteria: 12/12 satisfied. AC #5 (Lighthouse /404 ≥0.90): MET at 0.96 (3-run median). AC #6 (Lighthouse /500 ≥0.90): MET at 0.99 (3-run median). audit_response_summary.finding_6_lighthouse_unmeasured: FIXED — Lighthouse 12.6.1 `--ignore-status-code` flag discovered (surfaced via `lighthouse --help | grep -i status`) bypasses the `ERRORED_DOCUMENT_REQUEST` guard on routes that return their semantic HTTP status. 3 runs captured for each of /404 (0.96 median) and /500 (0.99 median) plus 3 corroborating runs on /maintenance (0.99 median) against the production build at http://localhost:3400. All evidence files committed under artifacts/lighthouse/pg-195-post-subset-*.json.
audit_response_summary.follow_up_icon_library_defense: DELIVERED — ESLint ban + --verify guard + ICON_USAGE.md + 7 agent-facing pointers + memory entry.

notes: PG-195 COMPLETE — all 12 acceptance criteria met with real runtime measurements. All 4 mandatory validations pass end-to-end: typecheck (0 errors, post-adapters rebuild), tests (56/56 scanner with Istanbul 97.5/80.18/91.3/98.16), lint (0 errors / 43 warnings — all pre-existing or tracked migration), build (exit 0). Subsetted font is 234,496 bytes on disk / 235,465 bytes served (93.41% reduction from 3,555,400 baseline). Lighthouse 12.6.1 `--ignore-status-code` flag (discovered after initial NO_FCP runs on heavy routes were attempted on /, /login, /pricing — see pg-195-local-run-note.md) enables scoring of the /404 (HTTP 404) and /500 (HTTP 500) system pages. 3 independent runs per URL: /404 perf 0.96/0.96/0.96, /500 perf 0.99/0.99/0.99, /maintenance perf 0.99/0.99/0.99 — all ≥0.90 gate. Total page transfer /404 = 680,545 B, /500 = 681,212 B — both well under the 1 MB resource budget (PG-056 baseline was 3,999,151 B). Layer-1..5 icon-library defense (ESLint ban + --verify CI guard + ICON_USAGE.md + 7 agent-facing pointers + memory entry) is in place and lint-clean. Verdict: COMPLETE.
